description: Play 2048 online for free. Slide tiles to combine numbers and reach the 2048 tile. No download needed — runs entirely in your browser.
hint: Arrow keys or swipe to move tiles

howToUse.label: Start
howToUse.description: The board starts with two tiles (2 or 4). A new tile appears after each move.

howToUse.label: Move tiles
howToUse.description: Use arrow keys on desktop or swipe on mobile to slide all tiles in one direction.

howToUse.label: Merge
howToUse.description: When two tiles with the same number collide, they merge into one tile with their combined value.

howToUse.label: Reach 2048
howToUse.description: Keep merging until you create a 2048 tile to win. You can choose to keep playing after winning.

faq.question: What is 2048?
faq.answer: 2048 is a sliding tile puzzle. You move tiles on a 4×4 grid to merge matching numbers, aiming to create a tile with the value 2048.

faq.question: How do I control the tiles?
faq.answer: Use arrow keys on a keyboard, or swipe left, right, up, or down on a touchscreen.

faq.question: Is my best score saved?
faq.answer: Yes. Your best score is automatically saved in your browser's local storage and will be there when you return.

faq.question: What happens when the board fills up?
faq.answer: If there are no empty cells and no adjacent tiles with the same number, the game ends.

faq.question: Can I keep playing after reaching 2048?
faq.answer: Yes. When you reach 2048 you can choose to keep going and aim for 4096 or beyond.
